text:
Hmm, I wrote the original kbd.
Looks very weird, In my original pr, you can see the last O
http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=173950
+  108   nop    nop    nop    nop    nop    nop    nop    nop     O

But if you click to "Download patch.txt"... - raw file doesn't have this
last O anymore.
+  108   nop    nop    nop    nop    nop    nop    nop    nop
